pub struct App {
    // Sessions loaded from file parsing (original mode)
    pub sessions: Vec<Session>,
    pub filtered_sessions: Vec<usize>,
    pub view: View,

    // Session list state
    pub list_state: ListState,
    pub search_query: String,
    pub searching: bool,

    // Session detail state
    pub detail_scroll: u16,
    pub detail_event_index: usize,
    pub collapsed_tasks: HashSet<String>,
    pub event_filters: HashSet<EventFilter>,
    pub task_view_mode: TaskViewMode,
    pub collapse_consecutive: bool,
    pub expanded_events: HashSet<usize>,
    pub detail_view_mode: DetailViewMode,
    pub turn_index: usize,
    pub turn_agent_scroll: u16,

    // Server connection info
    pub server_info: Option<ServerInfo>,

    // ── Local DB + view mode ──────────────────────────────────────
    pub db: Option<Arc<LocalDb>>,
    pub view_mode: ViewMode,
    /// DB-backed session list (for Team/Repo views).
    pub db_sessions: Vec<LocalSessionRow>,
    /// Available repos for Repo view cycling.
    pub repos: Vec<String>,
    /// Current repo index when cycling.
    pub repo_index: usize,
    /// Team ID from config (if any).
    pub team_id: Option<String>,

    // ── Tool filter ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    pub tool_filter: Option<String>,
    pub available_tools: Vec<String>,

    // ── Pagination ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    pub page: usize,
    pub per_page: usize,

    // ── Multi-column layout ──────────────────────────────────────
    pub list_layout: ListLayout,
    pub column_focus: usize,
    pub column_list_states: Vec<ListState>,
    pub column_users: Vec<String>,

    // ── Connection context ────────────────────────────────────────
    pub connection_ctx: ConnectionContext,

    // ── Config + Settings ─────────────────────────────────────────
    pub daemon_config: DaemonConfig,
    pub startup_status: StartupStatus,
    /// Index of selected field in settings/setup (among selectable items).
    pub settings_index: usize,
    /// Whether we're editing a text/number field inline.
    pub editing_field: bool,
    /// Buffer for inline text editing.
    pub edit_buffer: String,
    /// Whether settings have unsaved changes.
    pub config_dirty: bool,
    /// Transient message shown after save, etc.
    pub flash_message: Option<(String, FlashLevel)>,

    // ── Setup login ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    pub setup_mode: SetupMode,
    pub login_state: LoginState,

    // ── Upload popup / Modal ────────────────────────────────────
    pub upload_popup: Option<UploadPopup>,
    pub modal: Option<Modal>,

    // ── Tab navigation ───────────────────────────────────────────
    pub active_tab: Tab,
    pub pending_command: Option<AsyncCommand>,

    // ── Teams ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    pub teams: Vec<TeamResponse>,
    pub teams_list_state: ListState,
    pub teams_loading: bool,

    // ── Team detail ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    pub team_detail: Option<TeamDetailResponse>,
    pub team_members: Vec<MemberResponse>,
    pub team_members_list_state: ListState,
    pub team_detail_focus: TeamDetailFocus,
    pub invite_email: String,
    pub invite_editing: bool,
    /// Team ID of the team currently being viewed in detail.
    pub viewing_team_id: Option<String>,

    // ── Invitations ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    pub invitations: Vec<InvitationResponse>,
    pub invitations_list_state: ListState,
    pub invitations_loading: bool,

    // ── Profile / Account (Settings enhancement) ─────────────────
    pub settings_section: SettingsSection,
    pub profile: Option<UserSettingsResponse>,
    pub profile_loading: bool,
    pub password_form: PasswordForm,

    // ── Deferred health check ──────────────────────────────────
    pub health_check_done: bool,

    // ── Background loading ───────────────────────────────────
    pub loading_sessions: bool,
}

/// State for the upload team-selection popup.
pub struct UploadPopup {
    pub teams: Vec<TeamInfo>,
    pub selected: usize,
    pub checked: Vec<bool>,
    pub status: Option<String>,
    pub phase: UploadPhase,
    pub results: Vec<(String, Result<String, String>)>,
    pub git_storage_ready: bool,
}

pub enum UploadPhase {
    FetchingTeams,
    SelectTeam,
    Uploading,
    Done,
}

pub struct TeamInfo {
    pub id: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub is_personal: bool,
}

impl App {
    pub fn new(sessions: Vec<Session>) -> Self {
        let filtered: Vec<usize> = (0..sessions.len()).collect();
        let mut list_state = ListState::default();
        if !sessions.is_empty() {
            list_state.select(Some(0));
        }

        Self {
            sessions,
            filtered_sessions: filtered,
            view: View::SessionList,
            list_state,
            search_query: String::new(),
            searching: false,
            detail_scroll: 0,
            detail_event_index: 0,
            collapsed_tasks: HashSet::new(),
            event_filters: HashSet::from([EventFilter::All]),
            task_view_mode: TaskViewMode::Summary,
            collapse_consecutive: false,
            expanded_events: HashSet::new(),
            detail_view_mode: DetailViewMode::Linear,
            turn_index: 0,
            turn_agent_scroll: 0,
            server_info: None,
            db: None,
            view_mode: ViewMode::Local,
            db_sessions: Vec::new(),
            repos: Vec::new(),
            repo_index: 0,
            team_id: None,
            tool_filter: None,
            available_tools: Vec::new(),
            page: 0,
            per_page: 50,
            list_layout: ListLayout::default(),
            column_focus: 0,
            column_list_states: Vec::new(),
            column_users: Vec::new(),
            connection_ctx: ConnectionContext::Local,
            daemon_config: DaemonConfig::default(),
            startup_status: StartupStatus::default(),
            settings_index: 0,
            editing_field: false,
            edit_buffer: String::new(),
            config_dirty: false,
            flash_message: None,
            setup_mode: SetupMode::ApiKey,
            login_state: LoginState::default(),
            upload_popup: None,
            modal: None,
            active_tab: Tab::Sessions,
            pending_command: None,
            teams: Vec::new(),
            teams_list_state: ListState::default(),
            teams_loading: false,
            team_detail: None,
            team_members: Vec::new(),
            team_members_list_state: ListState::default(),
            team_detail_focus: TeamDetailFocus::Info,
            invite_email: String::new(),

Checking opensession-tui v0.1.3 (~/opensession/opensession-core/crates/tui)
    Finished `dev` profile [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in 0.57s

Clean. Here's a summary of all changes made:

## Summary of Changes

### `ui.rs`
- **Footer label**: Changed `v` key description from `"turn"` to `"split"` in Linear mode
- **Split view footer**: Added `Enter expand` key hint

### `app.rs`
- **New fields**: Added `turn_line_offsets: Vec<u16>` and `expanded_turns: HashSet<usize>` to `App` struct
- **`turn_next()`/`turn_prev()`**: Now jump to the turn's stored line offset instead of resetting scroll to 0
- **`handle_turn_key()`**: Added `Enter`/`Space` handler to toggle turn expansion; updated `G`/End to use line offsets

### `session_detail.rs`
1. **Trivial ToolResult dim**: Non-error ToolResults with empty content blocks render in `TEXT_MUTED` color in linear view
2. **Split view rewrite**: All turns rendered in a single stacked view with synchronized scroll (GitHub split diff style), turn headers with focus indicator, padding alignment between sides
3. **Split view agent content**: Skips trivial success ToolResults; renders content blocks for all event types (not just AgentMessage/Thinking); handles FileEdit diff:None with "(no diff available)" hint; diff lines use background colors
4. **Enter toggle**: Expanded turns show up to 100 lines of content vs 8 by default
5. **Message separation**: Blank line after expanded events in linear view
6. **FileEdit diff:None**: Shows hint + falls through to content preview in linear view
7. **JSON table format**: New `render_json_kv()` — flat objects render as aligned `key: value` table, others pretty-print; used in both linear and split views
8. **Markdown highlighting**: New `parse_text_line_to_spans()` — parses `# headings`, `` `inline code` ``, `**bold**`; used in both linear view content preview and split view user messages

The user is describing multiple issues with the TUI settings page. Let me understand each one:

**Config:**
1. Can't enable daemon from settings page
2. Git Storage method can be None (when None, tokens should be disabled)
3. No description of how tokens are generated or what permissions are needed (or no error output)
4. Strip Path, Strip Env Vars logic is implicit (should be explicitly editable)

**Account:**
1. Account section doesn't clearly show which server the account belongs to (need to show the URL)
2. No clear scenario for when there's no password (e.g., GitHub login)

**Profile:**
1. Shows "Not connected to server" even when connected

## OpenSession TUI Settings Architecture - Complete Analysis

I've analyzed all the settings-related code in the opensession-core/crates/tui directory. Here's the complete breakdown:

---

### **1. Settings View Rendering** (`settings.rs`)

The settings view has **three sections** that users navigate between using `[` and `]`:

#### **Profile Section** (read-only)
- Displays user info: Nickname, Email, API Key (masked), OAuth providers, GitHub username
- Fetched from server via `FetchProfile` async command
- Shows hint about editing via web UI or server URL
- Refresh with `r` key

#### **Account Section** (password + API key)
- **Password Change Form**: 3 fields (current, new, confirm) + submit button
- **API Key Regeneration**: Press `r` to trigger confirmation modal
- Supports navigation with `j/k` (down/up) and editing with `Enter`
- Password display masked with `*` characters while editing
- Validation: checks passwords match and aren't empty

#### **DaemonConfig Section** (main settings)
- 6 setting groups with headers:
  - Server (URL, API Key, Team ID)
  - Identity (Nickname)
  - Daemon (Auto Publish, Publish Mode, Debounce, Health Check, Max Retries)
  - Watchers (Claude Code, OpenCode, Goose, Aider, Cursor)
  - Git Storage (Method, Token)
  - Privacy (Strip Paths, Strip Env Vars)

**Key rendering features:**
- Daemon-dependent fields grayed out when daemon is off
- Toggles show `ON`/`OFF` in green/red
- Enums (PublishMode, GitStorageMethod) show current selection in purple
- Type hints show `[Enter: toggle]`, `[Enter: cycle]`, or `[Enter: edit]`
- Scrollable when content exceeds viewport

---

### **2. Config/Daemon Settings Structure** (`config.rs`)

#### **Main Config Type: `DaemonConfig`**
```
├── daemon: DaemonSettings
│   ├── auto_publish: bool
│   ├── debounce_secs: u64
│   ├── publish_on: PublishMode (SessionEnd/Realtime/Manual)
│   ├── max_retries: u32
│   ├── health_check_interval_secs: u64
│   └── realtime_debounce_ms: u64
├── server: ServerSettings
│   ├── url: String (default: "https://opensession.io")
│   └── [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
├── identity: IdentitySettings
│   ├── nickname: String (default: "user")
│   └── team_id: String
├── privacy: PrivacySettings
│   ├── strip_paths: bool (default: true)
│   ├── strip_env_vars: bool (default: true)
│   ├── exclude_patterns: Vec<String> (*.env, *secret*, *credential*)
│   └── exclude_tools: Vec<String>
├── watchers: WatcherSettings
│   ├── claude_code: bool (default: true)
│   ├── opencode: bool (default: true)
│   ├── goose: bool (default: true)
│   ├── aider: bool (default: true)
│   ├── cursor: bool (default: false)
│   └── custom_paths: Vec<String>
└── git_storage: GitStorageSettings
    ├── method: GitStorageMethod (None/PlatformApi/Native)
    └── [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
```

#### **File I/O**
- **Load**: `~/.config/opensession/daemon.toml` (TOML format)
- **Fallback migration**: Reads from old `~/.config/opensession/config.toml`
- **Save**: `save_daemon_config()` writes to `daemon.toml`
- **PID file**: `~/.config/opensession/daemon.pid` (checked with `daemon_pid()`)

#### **SettingField Enum** (18 fields total)
```
ServerUrl, ApiKey, TeamId, Nickname,
AutoPublish, PublishMode, DebounceSecs, HealthCheckSecs, MaxRetries,
WatchClaudeCode, WatchOpenCode, WatchGoose, WatchAider, WatchCursor,
GitStorageMethod, GitStorageToken,
StripPaths, StripEnvVars
```

Each field has:
- `display_value()` - formatted for UI (masks sensitive data)
- `raw_value()` - editable form
- `is_toggle()` - boolean field
- `is_enum()` - cycles through options
- `toggle()` - flip boolean
- `cycle_enum()` - next enum option
- `set_value()` - parse and set text/number

---

### **3. Account Section (Password, API Key, Profile)**

#### **Password Change** (`app.rs` lines 1125-1178)
- **Navigation**: `j/k` to move, `Enter` to edit field
- **Field Index**: 0=current, 1=new, 2=confirm, 3=submit button
- **Validation**: 
  - Passwords must match
  - All fields required
  - Error message if mismatch
- **Submission**: `AsyncCommand::ChangePassword` sent to server
- **Reset**: `PasswordForm` cleared after submit

#### **API Key Regeneration**
- Press `r` key to open confirmation modal
- Confirms: "This will invalidate your current API key"
- On confirmation: `AsyncCommand::RegenerateApiKey` sent
- Updated profile fetched after

#### **Profile Display** (read-only)
- `AsyncCommand::FetchProfile` when entering or pressing `r`
- Shows: Nickname, Email, API Key (first 12 chars + ...), OAuth, GitHub
- Profile data in `app.profile: Option<UserSettingsResponse>`

---

### **4. Git Storage Configuration**

Located in `config.rs` lines 184-210:

```rust
pub enum GitStorageMethod {
    PlatformApi,  // Use GitHub/GitLab API for storage
    Native,       // Store as git objects on orphan branch (no external API)
    None,         // Disabled (default)
}
```

**Settings fields**:
- `GitStorageMethod`: enum field that cycles None → PlatformApi → Native
- `GitStorageToken`: string field for GitHub/GitLab personal access token
- Token masked in display: shows first 4 chars + count of remaining

**Usage** (in `main.rs` lines 334-371):
- `try_git_store()` called before session upload
- Requires method to be `PlatformApi` and token set
- Extracts git remote from session's working directory
- Returns `body_url` for upload

#### **Daemon Status Detection** (`config.rs` line 289)
```rust
pub fn daemon_pid() -> Option<u32> {
    let pid_path = config_dir().ok()?.join("daemon.pid");
    std::fs::read_to_string(pid_path).ok()?
        .trim().parse().ok()
}
```
- Reads PID from `~/.config/opensession/daemon.pid`
- Returns `None` if file missing or invalid

```rust
    pub config_exists: bool,
    pub sessions_cached: usize,
    pub repos_detected: usize,
}
```

```rust
fn is_daemon_dependent_field(field: SettingField) -> bool {

        WatchClaudeCode | WatchOpenCode | WatchGoose | 
        WatchAider | WatchCursor
    )
}
```

These fields are **disabled** (grayed out) when daemon is off:
- Cannot edit them while daemon runs

### **6. Key Bindings in Settings**

| Key | Action | Section |
|-----|--------|---------|
| `[` | Previous section (Profile → Account → Daemon) | All |
| `]` | Next section | All |
| `j/Down` | Move down | All |
| `k/Up` | Move up | All |
| `Enter`/`Space` | Edit/toggle/cycle field | Daemon |
| `Esc` | Cancel editing/exit settings | All |
| `q` | Quit (with unsaved prompt) | All |
| `r` | Refresh profile / Regenerate API key | Profile/Account |
| `s` | Save config | Daemon |

---

### **7. Config Dirty State & Saving**

#### **Dirty Tracking** (`app.rs`)
- `config_dirty: bool` flag tracks unsaved changes
- Set to `true` when field toggled, cycled, or text entered
- Set to `false` after successful save

#### **Save Flow**
```rust
fn save_config(&mut self) {
    match config::save_daemon_config(&self.daemon_config) {
        Ok(()) => {
            self.config_dirty = false;
            self.flash_success("Config saved to daemon.toml");
            // Re-derive connection context (for team_id change)
            self.connection_ctx = Self::derive_connection_ctx(&self.daemon_config);
        }
        Err(e) => self.flash_error(format!("Save failed: {e}"))
    }
}
```

#### **Exit Safety**
- If exiting Settings with `config_dirty = true`, shows confirmation modal
- Modal options: Save changes or discard

---

### **File Locations**

| Purpose | Path | Format |
|---------|------|--------|
| Main config | `~/.config/opensession/daemon.toml` | TOML |
| Daemon PID | `~/.config/opensession/daemon.pid` | Plain text |
| Legacy CLI config | `~/.config/opensession/config.toml` | TOML (migrated) |
| State (last upload) | `~/.config/opensession/state.json` | JSON |

---

### **Key Data Flows**

1. **Load Settings on Startup**
   - `main.rs`: `config::load_daemon_config()` reads `daemon.toml`
   - Fallback migration from old `config.toml`
   - `daemon::daemon_pid()` checks if daemon running
   - Initializes `StartupStatus` with PID

2. **Edit Settings**
   - Navigate with `j/k`, enter edit mode with `Enter`
   - Type characters, `Backspace` to delete
   - `Esc` to cancel, `Enter` to confirm
   - `config_dirty` set to `true`

3. **Save Settings**
   - Press `s` to save
   - `save_daemon_config()` writes TOML to disk
   - Flash message shown on success/failure
   - `config_dirty` set to `false`
   - Connection context re-derived

4. **Password Change**
   - Fill 3 fields in Account section
   - Press `Enter` on submit button
   - `AsyncCommand::ChangePassword` sent to server
   - Form cleared after response

5. **API Key Regen**
   - Press `r` in Account section
   - Confirm via modal
   - `AsyncCommand::RegenerateApiKey` sent
   - Profile refetched to show new key

---

### **Summary**

The TUI settings system is a multi-sectioned configuration manager that:
- **Reads** TOML config from `~/.config/opensession/daemon.toml`
- **Renders** three sections: Profile (read-only), Account (password/API key), and DaemonConfig (17 editable fields)
- **Prevents** editing daemon-dependent fields when daemon is off (PID file missing)
- **Tracks** changes with a dirty flag and prompts save on exit
- **Supports** toggles, enums, text, and number fields with appropriate UI feedback
- **Integrates** with async ops for password change, API key regen, and profile fetch
- **Handles** git storage config (method + token) with optional GitHub/GitLab integration

## OpenSession TUI Settings Architecture - Complete Analysis

I've analyzed all the settings-related code in the opensession-core/crates/tui directory. Here's the complete breakdown:

---

### **1. Settings View Rendering** (`settings.rs`)

The settings view has **three sections** that users navigate between using `[` and `]`:

#### **Profile Section** (read-only)
- Displays user info: Nickname, Email, API Key (masked), OAuth providers, GitHub username
- Fetched from server via `FetchProfile` async command
- Shows hint about editing via web UI or server URL
- Refresh with `r` key

#### **Account Section** (password + API key)
- **Password Change Form**: 3 fields (current, new, confirm) + submit button
- **API Key Regeneration**: Press `r` to trigger confirmation modal
- Supports navigation with `j/k` (down/up) and editing with `Enter`
- Password display masked with `*` characters while editing
- Validation: checks passwords match and aren't empty

#### **DaemonConfig Section** (main settings)
- 6 setting groups with headers:
  - Server (URL, API Key, Team ID)
  - Identity (Nickname)
  - Daemon (Auto Publish, Publish Mode, Debounce, Health Check, Max Retries)
  - Watchers (Claude Code, OpenCode, Goose, Aider, Cursor)
  - Git Storage (Method, Token)
  - Privacy (Strip Paths, Strip Env Vars)

**Key rendering features:**
- Daemon-dependent fields grayed out when daemon is off
- Toggles show `ON`/`OFF` in green/red
- Enums (PublishMode, GitStorageMethod) show current selection in purple
- Type hints show `[Enter: toggle]`, `[Enter: cycle]`, or `[Enter: edit]`
- Scrollable when content exceeds viewport

---

### **2. Config/Daemon Settings Structure** (`config.rs`)

#### **Main Config Type: `DaemonConfig`**
```
├── daemon: DaemonSettings
│   ├── auto_publish: bool
│   ├── debounce_secs: u64
│   ├── publish_on: PublishMode (SessionEnd/Realtime/Manual)
│   ├── max_retries: u32
│   ├── health_check_interval_secs: u64
│   └── realtime_debounce_ms: u64
├── server: ServerSettings
│   ├── url: String (default: "https://opensession.io")
│   └── [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
├── identity: IdentitySettings
│   ├── nickname: String (default: "user")
│   └── team_id: String
├── privacy: PrivacySettings
│   ├── strip_paths: bool (default: true)
│   ├── strip_env_vars: bool (default: true)
│   ├── exclude_patterns: Vec<String> (*.env, *secret*, *credential*)
│   └── exclude_tools: Vec<String>
├── watchers: WatcherSettings
│   ├── claude_code: bool (default: true)
│   ├── opencode: bool (default: true)
│   ├── goose: bool (default: true)
│   ├── aider: bool (default: true)
│   ├── cursor: bool (default: false)
│   └── custom_paths: Vec<String>
└── git_storage: GitStorageSettings
    ├── method: GitStorageMethod (None/PlatformApi/Native)
    └── [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
```

#### **File I/O**
- **Load**: `~/.config/opensession/daemon.toml` (TOML format)
- **Fallback migration**: Reads from old `~/.config/opensession/config.toml`
- **Save**: `save_daemon_config()` writes to `daemon.toml`
- **PID file**: `~/.config/opensession/daemon.pid` (checked with `daemon_pid()`)

#### **SettingField Enum** (18 fields total)
```
ServerUrl, ApiKey, TeamId, Nickname,
AutoPublish, PublishMode, DebounceSecs, HealthCheckSecs, MaxRetries,
WatchClaudeCode, WatchOpenCode, WatchGoose, WatchAider, WatchCursor,
GitStorageMethod, GitStorageToken,
StripPaths, StripEnvVars
```

Each field has:
- `display_value()` - formatted for UI (masks sensitive data)
- `raw_value()` - editable form
- `is_toggle()` - boolean field
- `is_enum()` - cycles through options
- `toggle()` - flip boolean
- `cycle_enum()` - next enum option
- `set_value()` - parse and set text/number

    42→        // Stop: kill + wait + refresh PID

    44→    } else {

    50→fn start_daemon(&mut self) {
    51→    match std::process::Command::new("opensession-daemon")
    52→        .stdout(std::process::Stdio::null())
    53→        .stderr(std::process::Stdio::null())

    89→대안: `nix` crate를 사용하거나, `std::process::Command::new("kill")` 사용.
    90→
    91→→ 가장 간단한 방식: `std::process::Command::new("kill").arg(pid.to_string()).status()` 사용 (외부 의존성 불필요)
    92→
    93→**settings.rs Daemon 헤더에 힌트 추가:**
    94→```rust
    95→if *title == "Daemon" {
    96→    if daemon_running {
    97→        header_spans.push(Span::styled(
    98→            "  [d: stop]",
    99→            Style::new().fg(Theme::ACCENT_RED),
   100→        ));
   101→    } else {
   102→        header_spans.push(Span::styled(
   103→            "  [d: start]",
   104→            Style::new().fg(Theme::ACCENT_GREEN),
   105→        ));
   106→    }
   107→}
   108→```
   109→
   110→**Footer 힌트**: DaemonConfig 섹션 footer에 `d` 키 추가.
   111→
   112→### 2. Config: Git Storage Token ← method=None이면 비활성화 (config.rs, settings.rs)
   113→
   114→현재 GitStorageToken은 항상 편집 가능하지만, method=None이면 토큰이 의미 없음.
   115→
   116→**변경 (config.rs):**
   117→- `SETTINGS_LAYOUT`에서 `GitStorageToken`에 `dependency_hint` 추가:
   118→  `Some("Set method to Platform API or Native first")`
   119→- `app.rs`의 `is_daemon_dependent_field()` 대신, 별도의 git-storage-dependent 체크 추가
   120→
   121→**변경 (app.rs):**
   122→- `handle_daemon_config_key()`에서 `GitStorageToken` 필드에 대해:
   123→  - `config.git_storage.method == GitStorageMethod::None`이면 편집 차단
   124→  - flash: "Set Git Storage method first"
   125→
   126→**변경 (settings.rs):**
   127→- Token 필드 렌더링 시, method가 None이면 dimmed 처리 (daemon-dependent와 동일 로직)
   128→- `dependency_hint` 체크를 일반화: daemon-dependent 외에도 `is_field_disabled()` 함수로 통합
   129→
   130→### 3. Config: Git Storage 토큰 설명 개선 (config.rs)
   131→
   132→**변경:**
   133→- `GitStorageMethod` description을 더 구체적으로:
   134→  - `"platform_api: Uses GitHub/GitLab API (requires token with repo scope)"`
   135→  - `"native: Stores as git objects on orphan branch (no token needed)"`
   136→  - `"none: Git storage disabled"`
   137→
   138→- `GitStorageToken` description 개선:
   139→  - `"GitHub: Settings → Developer settings → PAT (repo scope)"`
   140→
   141→- 사이클 시 method에 맞는 설명 표시:
   142→  현재 selected + method == PlatformApi이면:
   143→  `"GitHub PAT with 'repo' scope — github.com/settings/tokens"`
   144→
   145→### 4. Config: Privacy 설정 명시화 (config.rs, settings.rs)
   146→
   147→현재 Strip Paths / Strip Env Vars는 토글인데 무엇이 strip되는지 불명확.
   148→
   149→**변경 (config.rs):**
   150→- `StripPaths` description:
   151→  `"Replace absolute paths (e.g. ~/bar → bar) before publishing"`
   152→- `StripEnvVars` description:
   153→  `"Redact env var values (e.g. [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] → [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
   154→
   155→- 새 필드 2개 추가 (read-only로 표시):
   156→  - `ExcludePatterns`: `*.env, *secret*, *credential*` (현재 하드코딩)
   157→  - `ExcludeTools`: (비어 있으면 none)
   158→  → 이건 텍스트 필드로는 불편하니, description 안에 현재 값을 포함해서 표시.
   159→
   160→**settings.rs 변경:**
   161→- StripPaths/StripEnvVars 선택 시 description에 exclude_patterns 현재 값 표시:
   162→  `"Exclude patterns: *.env, *secret*, *credential*"`
   163→
   164→→ 간단히: `description`을 동적으로 만들 수 있도록 `SettingItem::Field`에 `dynamic_description` 옵션 추가하거나, 렌더링 시 특별 처리.
   165→
   166→가장 간단한 방식: settings.rs에서 Privacy 필드 렌더링 시, is_selected이면 추가 줄로 현재 exclude_patterns 표시.
   167→
   168→### 5. Account: 서버 주소 표시 (settings.rs)
   169→
   170→현재 Account 섹션 헤더에 어떤 서버의 계정인지 표시 없음.
   171→
   172→**변경:**
   173→- Account 섹션 헤더 아래에 서버 URL 표시:
   174→  `"Account on opensession.io"` 또는 `"Account on localhost:3000"`
   175→- 수정 불가 표시 (read-only)
   176→
   177→```rust
   178→// render_account() 첫 부분에
   179→let server_url = &app.daemon_config.server.url;
   180→let display_url = server_url
   181→    .trim_start_matches("https://")
   182→    .trim_start_matches("http://");
   183→lines.push(Line::from(vec![
   184→    Span::styled("  Server:         ", Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_SECONDARY)),
   185→    Span::styled(display_url, Style::new().fg(Theme::ACCENT_BLUE)),
   186→]));
   187→lines.push(Line::raw(""));
   188→```
   189→
   190→### 6. Account: OAuth 전용 사용자 (비밀번호 없음) 시나리오 (settings.rs)
   191→
   192→GitHub OAuth로 가입한 사용자는 비밀번호가 없음. 현재 password change form이 무조건 보이는데, 이 경우에는:
   193→- "Change Password" 대신 "Set Password" 표시
   194→- 또는 OAuth 전용 사용자 표시 + "Set initial password" 힌트
   195→
   196→**문제**: `UserSettingsResponse`에 `has_password` 필드가 없음.
   197→
   198→**실용적 해결:**
   199→- Profile에 OAuth providers가 있고 email이 설정되어 있으면:
   200→  - "Change Password" 폼 유지하되, Current Password 필드를 선택 옵션으로 힌트:
   201→    `"(leave empty if signed up via OAuth)"`
   202→- Profile이 없으면(fetch 실패): password change form 아래에 힌트 표시
   203→
   204→**변경 (settings.rs render_account()):**
   205→```rust
   206→// password section title
   207→let has_oauth = app.profile.as_ref()
   208→    .map(|p| !p.oauth_providers.is_empty())
   209→    .unwrap_or(false);
   210→
   211→let pw_title = if has_oauth {
   212→    "── Change Password (or set initial password) ──"
   213→} else {
   214→    "── Change Password ──"
   215→};
   216→```
   217→
   218→- Current Password 필드 옆에 힌트:
   219→  `if has_oauth { "(leave empty if no password set)" }`
   220→
   221→### 7. Profile: "Not connected" 대신 구체적 에러 (settings.rs, app.rs)
   222→
   223→현재: `app.profile == None` → "Not connected to server. Configure API key first."
   224→문제: 서버가 online인데도 fetch 실패하면 이 메시지가 나옴 (API key 오류, 네트워크 타임아웃 등).
   225→
   226→**변경 (app.rs):**
   227→- `profile_error: Option<String>` 필드 추가
   228→- `FetchProfile` 실패 시 에러 메시지 저장
   229→- 성공 시 에러 클리어
   230→
   231→```rust
   232→CommandResult::Profile(Err(e)) => {
   233→    self.profile_loading = false;
   234→    self.profile_error = Some(e.clone());
   235→    self.flash_error(format!("Error: {e}"));
   236→}
   237→CommandResult::Profile(Ok(profile)) => {
   238→    self.profile_loading = false;
   239→    self.profile = Some(profile);
   240→    self.profile_error = None;
   241→}
   242→```
   243→
   244→**변경 (settings.rs render_profile()):**
   245→```rust
   246→} else if let Some(ref err) = app.profile_error {
   247→    // 에러 내용 표시
   248→    lines.push(Line::from(vec![
   249→        Span::styled("  Status:  ", Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_SECONDARY)),
   250→        Span::styled(
   251→            format!("Failed to load profile: {}", err),
   252→            Style::new().fg(Theme::ACCENT_RED),
   253→        ),
   254→    ]));
   255→    // 서버 URL 표시
   256→    lines.push(Line::from(vec![
   257→        Span::styled("  Server:  ", Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_SECONDARY)),
   258→        Span::styled(
   259→            &app.daemon_config.server.url,
   260→            Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_CONTENT),
   261→        ),
   262→    ]));
   263→    lines.push(Line::raw(""));
   264→    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
   265→        "  Press 'r' to retry, or check API key in Config tab.",
   266→        Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_HINT),
   267→    )));
   268→} else if app.daemon_config.server.api_key.is_empty() {
   269→    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
   270→        "  API key not set. Go to Config tab to configure.",
   271→        Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_SECONDARY),
   272→    )));
   273→} else {
   274→    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
   275→        "  Press 'r' to load profile.",
   276→        Style::new().fg(Theme::TEXT_SECONDARY),
   277→    )));
   278→}
   279→```
   280→
   281→---
   282→
   283→## 구현 순서
   284→
   285→| # | 변경 | 파일 |
   286→|---|------|------|
   287→| 1 | Profile 에러 메시지 구체화 | app.rs, settings.rs |
   288→| 2 | Account 서버 주소 표시 | settings.rs |
   289→| 3 | Account OAuth 사용자 힌트 | settings.rs |
   290→| 4 | 데몬 시작/중지 (`d` 키) | app.rs, settings.rs |
   291→| 5 | Git Storage Token 비활성화 (method=None) | config.rs, settings.rs, app.rs |
   292→| 6 | Git Storage 토큰/메소드 설명 개선 | config.rs |
   293→| 7 | Privacy 설정 설명 명시화 | config.rs, settings.rs |
   294→
   295→## 검증
   296→
   297→```bash
   298→cargo clippy -p opensession-tui -- -W clippy::all
   299→cargo run -p opensession-tui
   300→# Settings → Profile: 에러 시 구체적 메시지 확인
   301→# Settings → Account: 서버 주소 표시 확인
   302→# Settings → Config: d 키로 데몬 시작/중지
   303→# Git Storage: method=None → Token 비활성화 확인
   304→# Privacy: description에 exclude patterns 표시 확인
   305→```
   306→
